rationale: Server selection spec requires aggregate with $out treated as write; driver routed to secondary instead.
Improvement implementing CMAP spec update from DRIVERS-688; adding new event reason value per spec rollout.
Enable Python faulthandler for segfault tracebacks; CI/test infrastructure improvement, no spec involvement.
Topology.close() opens new monitors/pools unexpectedly; internal lifecycle bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Topology events executor closed slowly on GC due to missing weakref callback; internal timing issue, not spec.
C module decodes/re-encodes RawBSONDocument, changing UUID binary subtype; BSON round-trip fidelity violated.
Adding pymongocrypt abstraction layer for libmongocrypt I/O callbacks; internal architecture, not a spec deviation.
memoryview-with-offset decoding crashes; Python-specific API limitation, BSON spec does not define memoryview semantics.
Implementing FLE corpus spec test per DRIVERS-686; adding test infrastructure for CSFLE spec.
is_locked uses deprecated current_op internally; API deprecation warning, no spec rule involved.
Adding tests for ClientEncryption.close() idempotency; test coverage addition, not a spec conformance fix.
connectTimeoutMS not applied to DNS resolver call during SRV URI parsing; implementation gap, no spec rule naming DNS timeout.
Transaction spec test uses readConcern snapshot on sharded cluster causing server error; test fix, not spec.
CRUD spec test fails because collection already exists before test runs; test setup bug, not spec nonconformance.
Cap dnspython dependency at 1.16 for Python 2 compatibility; dependency/packaging change, no spec involvement.
OSError when libmongocrypt not found prevents pymongo import; packaging/import error handling, not spec.
Auto-encryption MongoClient cannot reopen after close(); implementation limitation, no spec rule requires reuse after close.
Spec requires key vault createDataKey with write concern majority and finds with read concern majority; driver violated both.
pymongocrypt wheel missing embedded mongocrypt on Ubuntu 18; packaging/distribution issue, not spec.
Test missing require_test_commands decorator causing failure without failpoint support; test infrastructure fix.
Resync encryption spec tests after error message change in SPEC-1445/CDRIVER-3125; spec test file update.
ChangeStream custom type test fails with DuplicateKeyError due to missing collection cleanup between runs; test bug.
Race condition in database aggregation test using w=0 drop vs w=0 aggregate; flaky test fix, not spec.
GridFS spec test runner has UnboundLocalError when operation raises exception; test runner bug, not spec nonconformance.
Docs show unquoted pip install command that fails in zsh; documentation typo, not spec.
Large bulk insert with compressor sends oversized message causing server error; driver must split per maxMessageSizeBytes before compression.
dnspython super() bug on CPython 2.7 causes SRV test failures; third-party library compatibility issue, not spec.
Implementing missing prose tests 4, 6, 10 from change streams spec; test coverage addition per spec.
Test helper uses dict instead of SON for failpoint command causing key ordering failure; test infrastructure fix.
decode_file_iter raises ValueError instead of InvalidBSON for invalid size; Python-specific exception wrapping, not BSON spec violation.
mongocryptd subprocess spawning leaks ResourceWarning; implementation/subprocess handling detail, not spec.
unicode(PyMongoError) raises UnicodeDecodeError on Python 2; Python 2 string encoding regression, no spec involvement.
Improvement + Issue split from DRIVERS-578; proactive spec rollout for fork-safety, driver was not previously wrong.
getMore overrides readPreference to primary ignoring original cursor's readPreference; spec requires getMore uses cursor's read preference.
Background thread does I/O while holding topology lock; internal threading/performance issue, no spec rule specifies lock behavior.
Retryable writes return wrong results when MongoClient shared across fork; user misuse + fork-safety implementation bug, not spec.
Collect Windows crash dumps from mongo-orchestration after task execution; CI infrastructure improvement, not spec.
close_socket() missing required 'reason' argument; internal API bug introduced by refactor, not spec.
MongoClient.close() creates then immediately discards new connections; internal lifecycle inefficiency, not spec.
SSL race condition causing test_validation_with_system_ca_certs to fail intermittently on macOS; flaky test, not spec.
python_full_version marker comparison broken in old setuptools; build/packaging bug, no spec involvement.
SDAM spec requires publishing ServerDescriptionChangedEvent/TopologyDescriptionChangedEvent on error reset; driver skipped events.
Server changed NamespaceNotFound error message; driver updated string-matching to error code; server-compatibility fix, not spec.
test_ssl_pem_passphrase fails on RHEL 7.0 after TLS changes; platform-specific test failure, not spec.
Depends on DRIVERS-633; defines multi-phase SDAM spec runner behavior; component 'Resyncing Spec Tests', test infrastructure update.

Depends on DRIVERS-808; component 'Resyncing Spec Tests'; specifying empty authSource behavior via spec test resync.
